Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class IctWithdrawalTravelRule

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.IctWithdrawalTravelRule
public class IctWithdrawalTravelRule extends Object
IctWithdrawalTravelRule - The travel rule information for the ICT withdrawal

    • originatingInstitution

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<IctWithdrawalOriginatingInstitution> originatingInstitution()
      The name and account id of institution sourcing the funds. Always 'Apex Clearing' and investor account id for ICT withdrawals;

    • recipientInstitution

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<IctWithdrawalRecipientInstitution> recipientInstitution()
      The name and account id of the external financial institution that will take receipt of the funds.
